mapper.select:
/* SQL ID : SchDAO.listAcadSch 설 명 : 학사일정 조회 */
SELECT TLCM.ORG_ID -- , TLOSC.SMSTR_COHORT_TYCD -- , '[' || (CASE WHEN SMSTR_COHORT_TYCD = 'course' THEN '과목' ELSE '개인' END) || ']' AS PREFIX , TLSO.ATNDLC_SDTTM , TLSO.ATNDLC_EDTTM FROM TB_LMS_SBJCT_OFRNG TLSO , TB_LMS_CRS_MSTR TLCM WHERE TLSO.CRS_MSTR_ID = TLCM.CRS_MSTR_ID AND ( SUBSTR(TLSO.ATNDLC_SDTTM,1,8) >= '20260101' AND SUBSTR(TLSO.ATNDLC_SDTTM,1,8) < '20260131' OR SUBSTR(TLSO.ATNDLC_EDTTM,1,8) >= '20260101' AND SUBSTR(TLSO.ATNDLC_EDTTM,1,8) < '20260131' )
AND (UNIV_CD = #{uniCd} OR UNIV_CD = 'A' OR UNIV_CD IS NULL)
ORDER BY TLSO.ATNDLC_SDTTM, TLSO.ATNDLC_EDTTM
